title: Split news synthesis into selection and summary stages
description: news:synthesize sends the full raw briefing, including every article body and sightings metadata, to one pi invocation and can exceed the model context window. Rework synthesis so selection uses a compact headline/url file, selected stories are hydrated with article bodies, and final JSON generation sees only the selected hydrated sources.
close_reason: Implemented two-stage synthesis with compact selection input and hydrated final input.

title: Add visibility and timeout to briefing synthesis
description: The news synthesis step can appear to hang while pi runs with no progress or diagnostic output. Add observable logging and failure behavior so the caller can see what command is running and why it failed or timed out.
close_reason: Implemented live forwarding of pi stdout/stderr during synthesis

title: Improve news source fetching and fallbacks
description: Fix source failures that are caused by fetch buffering, missing HTTP status handling, narrow headline extraction, and identify usable fallback URLs for blocked news homepages.
close_reason: Implemented fetch fallbacks, RSS extraction, larger curl buffer, and source smoke verification.

title: Remove headline-only news sources from briefing pipeline
description:
The briefing pipeline should only use sources that can reliably provide article body text. Headline-only sources add noise during candidate selection and can be selected by the model, then fail hydration and leave gaps in the final briefing.

Review current source configs and remove or disable sources that cannot reliably hydrate selected article bodies. Based on the 2026-06-04 run, Reuters and El País are blocked by JS/ad-blocker/anti-bot responses during direct curl fetches, and France 24 video URLs returned 403 protected-page responses. Decide whether France 24 should be removed entirely or kept only if non-video article URLs can be reliably fetched. Keep betevé; its failure is covered separately by nb-2pe and appears to be an extractor bug rather than a blocked source.

Add or update tests so candidate generation/selection excludes disabled headline-only sources or blocked URL patterns.

title: Fix betevé article body extraction
description:
betevé pages can fetch successfully but hydrate as failed because the article extractor only inspects the first
block. In the 2026-06-04 run, the URL https://beteve.cat/mobilitat/carrers-tallats-visita-papa-barcelona-afectacio-transport/ returned HTTP 200 and contained the story text under #post-content-container[itemprop="articleBody"], but the first
block had no

tags, so extractArticleParagraphs returned zero paragraphs and the selected source logged ❌.\n\nUpdate extraction to prefer an article body container such as [itemprop="articleBody"] or #post-content-container when present, then fall back to the current

behavior. Add a regression test using representative betevé HTML with the body outside the first
.

title: Update briefing workflow documentation if needed
description: Update README and CLAUDE guidance only if the refactor changes setup, commands, or durable workflow expectations.

title: Normalize article paragraph text cleanup
description: Run article paragraph extraction through the same cleanup/entity-decoding path used by headline extraction so article bodies do not preserve HTML entities.
close_reason: Added article paragraph normalization through decodeNewsText so extracted bodies decode entities after stripping inline markup.

title: Expand news briefing refactor tests
description: Add or update tests for schema failures, preserved RSS bodies, path generation, retry/concurrency migration, and unchanged CLI-facing behavior.

title: Consolidate CLI runtime wiring
description: Replace repeated dependency wiring in run.ts, fetch.ts, and synthesize.ts with one shared live runtime configuration while keeping entrypoints intact.

title: Simplify headline candidate extraction
description: Extract pure helpers for candidate construction, URL resolution, headline validation, and deduplication to reduce repeated logic in extractHeadlineCandidates.
close_reason: Extracted pure helpers for candidate construction, headline validation, and immutable dedupe state, then refactored extractHeadlineCandidates to use them.

title: Refactor synthesis stage into Effect steps
description: Separate selection, selected-source hydration, and final synthesis into composable Effects with shared timing and logging helpers.

title: Compose the full news briefing pipeline with Effect
description: Refactor the top-level pipeline to compose clear, fetch, synthesize missing dates, commit, pull, and push steps using typed Effect services.

title: Refactor raw briefing fetch stage
description: Split source listing selection and candidate conversion into small pure helpers, keep persistence at the Effect boundary, and preserve current fetch-stage behavior.
close_reason: Split listing URL ordering, candidate selection, article conversion, and listing fetch selection out of buildRawBriefing; moved raw briefing writes through the Effect filesystem service.

title: Preserve RSS article bodies in raw briefings
description: Carry candidate.body from RSS extraction into raw briefing articles so hydration can skip unnecessary article fetches when a body is already available.
close_reason: Preserved candidate.body when converting RSS headline candidates into raw briefing articles and expanded raw fetch tests to assert RSS bodies are retained.

title: Create Effect runtime services for script edges
description: Introduce services/layers for filesystem, HTTP fetching, subprocess execution, pi execution, git commands, clock, and logging without changing CLI behavior.
close_reason: Added Effect runtime service tags and live layers for filesystem, HTTP, subprocess, pi, git, clock, and logging edges with tests.

title: Replace local retry and concurrency helpers with Effect
description: Use Effect Schedule retry and Effect.forEach concurrency for article fetching and similar async work, then remove duplicate local helpers where possible.
close_reason: Replaced local retry/concurrency helpers with Effect.retry/Schedule and Effect.forEach concurrency in article hydration, then removed obsolete helper files and tests.

title: Decode briefing JSON through schemas
description: Replace untyped JSON.parse casting with schema-backed decoding for raw files and pi output, with clear error messages for malformed agent output.
close_reason: Decoded raw briefing, pi selection, and pi synthesis JSON through Effect schemas with clear validation errors.

title: Extract shared news briefing path helpers
description: Centralize raw briefing, selection, final briefing, index, and generated commit paths so scripts do not repeat public/briefings path construction.
close_reason: Added shared briefing path helpers for raw, selection, final, index, dated file parsing, and generated git paths, then refactored existing scripts to use them.

title: Add Effect schemas for briefing data
description: Add Effect and define schemas for source configs, raw briefings, pi selection output, hydrated selections, and final generated briefing JSON where appropriate.
close_reason: Added Effect dependency and schema definitions with coverage for news briefing boundary data.

title: Epic: Refactor news briefing scripts with Effect
description: Track the incremental refactor of scripts/news-briefing to reduce duplicated workflow plumbing, add schema validation, and use Effect at I/O boundaries while preserving existing CLI behavior.

title: Improve news briefing test suite
description: Review and clean up weak tests in the news briefing suite, add coverage for meaningful edge cases, and keep behavior-focused assertions.
close_reason: Cleaned up brittle/duplicative tests and added behavior-focused coverage for briefing utilities.

title: Fetch article bodies only after story selection
description: The fetch stage currently downloads every candidate article body before synthesis, which is slow and unnecessary. Change the pipeline so raw briefing files contain compact article metadata, selection runs over headlines and URLs, and only selected source URLs are fetched and hydrated before final summary generation.
close_reason: Changed raw fetch to collect only candidate metadata and hydrate selected articles during synthesis.

title: Implement plan 001 news automation
description: Implement @plans/001-news-automation.md in the briefings repo: deterministic fetch pipeline, raw JSON persistence, synthesis via pi, scheduled runner, tests, and docs updates.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add tests for extraction, deduplication, and missing-briefing detection
description: Add unit tests covering headline/article extraction, deduplication behavior, raw-file shaping, and missing-briefing detection for the new TypeScript pipeline in scripts/news-briefing/.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add synthesis command for missing final briefings
description: Implement missing-briefing detection by comparing public/briefings/raw/*.json to public/briefings/*.json. Add a command that shells out to the pi CLI with a minimized prompt, reads a raw file, writes the final daily briefing JSON, and provide a top-level command that runs fetch first and then synthesizes any missing briefings.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add fetch pipeline to build daily raw briefing files
description: Implement the fetch stage in briefings: crawl configured source homepages, take the first 30 headline candidates per source in page order, deduplicate by article URL while preserving where each article was seen, fetch article bodies, and persist one raw file per day under public/briefings/raw/.
close_reason: Closed

title: Define raw briefing JSON schema and persistence
description: Define the raw JSON types and file conventions for public/briefings/raw/YYYY-MM-DD.json. The raw format should store one entry per unique article URL with source metadata, listing-page URL, first-seen position, headline text, and extracted body text, with stable output suitable for app-adjacent storage.
close_reason: Closed

title: Port source config and extraction logic from dotfiles skill
description: Create scripts/news-briefing/ in this repo and port the deterministic source configuration, headline extraction, and article extraction logic currently living in ~/Code/HerbCaudill/dotfiles/home/.claude/skills/news-briefing. Keep the extraction logic local and deterministic so the briefings repo owns the crawl/extract stage.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement news automation pipeline in briefings
description:
Move the deterministic news-ingestion pipeline into the briefings repo as described in plans/001-news-automation.md.

The current source skill and ingestion code live in ~/Code/HerbCaudill/dotfiles/home/.claude/skills/news-briefing. This epic tracks porting the deterministic fetch/extraction flow into briefings, adding raw daily inputs under public/briefings/raw, generating final daily briefing JSON locally, and then reducing the dotfiles side to scheduler + thin skill assumptions.
close_reason: Closed

title: Document cutover and simplify dotfiles news-briefing skill
description: Update briefings README.md and CLAUDE.md to document the new pipeline boundaries between briefings and dotfiles. After the briefings pipeline lands, simplify ~/Code/HerbCaudill/dotfiles/home/.claude/skills/news-briefing so it assumes pre-fetched raw JSON and leave only scheduler/LaunchAgent wiring in dotfiles.
close_reason: Closed
